_comment: Defense-in-depth Rule-of-Two permission layer (RESEARCH Pattern 2, Layer 2). Per-role tool scoping is enforced in each subagent SKILL.md frontmatter (allowed-tools/disallowed-tools): the oswald-eda fork denies mcp__dbt-build__* / git-write so the read-only EDA stage can never reach a build or PR tool; the oswald-model fork denies ticketing-read / mcp__dbt-eda__* so the untrusted ticket never enters the write context. These project-wide deny rules are the always-on backstop: clone (highest blast radius) and any merge tool are denied for EVERY skill/context — merge is a human-only gate behind branch protection (SEC-03), and Oswald never holds a merge tool in any role.
